data.body: do a little logical thinking - during setup, step 1, mount existing local repo clones, the first thing we do is show mounted repositories, which is fine.  But then when say we want to add more, it says "Found repositories" and lists all the ones already mounted, which is silly.  it should say "found unmounted repositories" and only show the ones not mounted.
data.title: foolery setup: directory scan: Enter numbers to mount:  Don't show mountted repositories a second time
